name: Udemy
description: Udemy's Affiliate API lets you search and browse the Udemy course catalog programmatically. You can find courses by keyword, category, or instructor, retrieve detailed course information, access pricing, ratings, reviews, and curriculum data.

capabilities.name: courses_list
capabilities.description: Search and browse the Udemy course catalog with filters for keyword, category, price, ratings, and more.

capabilities.name: courses_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific Udemy course including description, curriculum, instructor, and ratings.

capabilities.name: courses_reviews_list
capabilities.description: Fetch user reviews and ratings for a specific course.

capabilities.name: courses_curriculum_list
capabilities.description: Retrieve the public curriculum structure of a course including sections, lectures, and content types.
